---
title: "Myathropa florea"
params:
  species: "Myathropa florea"
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
      #title-block-header .title{
          text-align:center;
          font-size:3rem;
          font-style:italic;
          font-family:Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;
          color:#000;
          margin-bottom: 5rem !important;
          margin-top: 3rem !important;
      }
      </style>
---

::: {.species-common-names}
**EN** &nbsp;   Yellow-haired Sun Fly <br>
**LB** &nbsp;   Batmanschwiefmecke<br>
**FR** &nbsp;   Éristale des fleurs<br>
**DE** &nbsp;   Totenkopfschwebfliege<br>
**PT** &nbsp;   Mosca-zangão amarela
:::

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
here::i_am("atlas-mnhnl.Rproj")
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "0_Initialisation.R"))
```
## Conservation status
::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Europe
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](/images/LC.png){.logo}
:::

:::

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
### European Union (27)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![](/images/LC.png){.logo}
:::

:::

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Luxembourg (preliminary)
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](/images/NT.png){.logo}
:::

:::

![](/images/myathropa_florea.jpeg){.species-photo}

## Activity period


::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
```{r g-source}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
plot_activite_source(params$species)
```
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
```{r g-smooth}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: 'hide'
plot_activite_smooth(params$species)
```
:::

:::

## Description

## Habitat
### Immature
### Mature

## Distribution
### National
```{r m3}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
m3 <- get_species_map(params$species)
m3@map
```
